trails.name: David J. Culham Trail
trails.note: Best off-road trail near CVH. Streetsville to Burnhamthorpe. Reddit: 'only one car-street crossing'. NOT winter-maintained.

trails.name: Mississauga Waterfront Trail
trails.note: Etobicoke Creek mouth to Jack Darling. Rattray Marsh prohibits bikes.

trails.name: Martin Goodman Trail
trails.note: ONLY year-round-cleared trail in west GTA. Plowed within 6-8h of >5cm snow.

trails.name: Etobicoke Creek Trail
trails.note: Marie Curtis to Centennial Park. Markland Wood golf BREAKS continuity Dundas-Burnhamthorpe.

parks.name: Centennial Park (Etobicoke)
parks.note: 525-acre Toronto park; ski hill, Etobicoke Creek connector

parks.name: Marie Curtis Park
parks.note: Etobicoke Creek mouth at Lake Ontario

parks.name: Colonel Samuel Smith Park
parks.note: Per Great Runs, BEST west-GTA dog/run park

parks.name: Rattray Marsh
parks.note: NO BIKES rule (CVC) — quiet runner haven
